rationale: The Iran deal narrative continues without structural confirmation, keeping energy price hopes alive but unchanged for a Polish resident; no new qualitative shift this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal near, markets surge
top_events.summary: Trump says strikes called off and deal 'approved'; Iran says nothing finalized. Stock and oil markets reacted positively, potentially easing energy cost pressure for Poland.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Gaza overnight
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military operations in Gaza; no direct impact on Poland but contributes to regional instability backdrop.

top_events.title: Philippines earthquake, 37 dead
top_events.summary: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines; geographically distant, no meaningful impact on Polish daily life.
